ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "healthcare_expenditure" REAL /* Healthcare expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subgroups" (
  "subgroup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subgroup */,
  "subgroup_name" TEXT /* Name of the subgroup (e.g., Total 1 yr) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the subgroup (e.g., 1-2 years) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subgroup (e.g., Male, Female, All) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subgroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease (e.g., Haemophilus influenzae type B) */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine used for the disease */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the vaccine (e.g., Children under 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immunization_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immunization rate */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "subgroup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subgroup */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the immunization rate was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "rate" REAL /* Immunization rate value */,
  "footnotes" TEXT /* Footnotes for the immunization rate */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., Full, Partial) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunization_rates_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunization_rates_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunization_rates_subgroup_id FOREIGN KEY ("subgroup_id") REFERENCES subgroups ("subgroup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunization_rates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immunization_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., UN_UNICEF and World Health Organization) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the source data */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Percent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the immunization rate being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES immunization_rates ("rate_id")
)
